texto: I want people to take the initiative to find veterans that need help, veterans that are suffering and in need of assistance reintegrating from combat back into society, into normal family lives and jobs. We need to take a real 'boots on the ground' approach to helping veterans in need.
explicacao: Citação de Max Martini sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I want people to take the initiative to find veterans that need help, veterans that are suffering…” articula familia, family, veterans em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como veterans e help.

frase_original: I want people to take the initiative to find veterans that need help, veterans that are suffering and in need of assistance reintegrating from combat back into society, into normal family lives and jobs. We need to take a real 'boots on the ground' approach to helping veterans in need.
